title: Newsletter is now live!
blurb: Here you will find any and all of the latest news from our development team!
body:
Here you will find any and all of the latest news from our development team!  These Newsletter posts will automatically be sent to the discord as well.

As for other news, we are making good progress on the first test build for all of our testers, which will be a wave based game mode to defeat a number of enemies and explore an environment, looting new cybernetics before the next wave of enemies appear.
We hope you are excited too!​

title: WE DID IT! Kickstarter is Funded!
blurb: ORDER // ONE has blasted past 100% on Kickstarter! A huge thank you to every single backer! But we're not done yet. Check out our Stretch Goals!
body:
WE DID IT! ORDER // ONE has blasted past 100% on Kickstarter! We're still working hard to get a demo ready for our early backers very soon. You can look forward to some amazing things coming your way!

A huge thank you to everyone who pledged. From $1 to $1,000, every single one of you helped us get here! But we're not done yet! If you haven't pledged already, now is the perfect time to jump in and grab those early-bird rewards before they're gone.

Some tiers (including the Collector's Edition and other special rewards) will stay available after the Kickstarter ends, so you'll still have a chance to pick them up later if you prefer. Pledge now and help us reach even more milestones together!

We're also excited to share our Stretch Goals:

We'll be unlocking these as development continues, so spread the word to your friends and family about any that catch your eye.

Thank you all! More to come soon!

title: Composer A. Nathan Scott Joins the Team
blurb: Composer A. Nathan Scott has joined Aberrant Games to create the ORDER // ONE soundtrack — bringing over 15 years of hybrid orchestral and electronic experience to New Genesis Station.
body:
Huge news for ORDER // ONE. Composer A. Nathan Scott just joined the team to create the soundtrack.

He has over 15 years of experience and specializes in hybrid orchestral and electronic music for sci-fi, stealth, action, and horror games — basically a perfect fit for our world. He is already working on dark, synth-driven tracks that will bring New Genesis Station to life with tension and atmosphere.

He joined because he genuinely loves the project. He originally reached out after seeing our Reddit post and later told us the game reminded him of ARES VR, where he composed the full soundtrack. That same eerie, futuristic horror vibe is exactly what he is bringing to ORDER // ONE.

If you are excited about the direction of the audio, now is the time to back us. We are 26% funded with 25 days left. Thank you for the support! More soon. The Best Is Yet to Come.
